name: Cinder
description: Sears your target for 22 damage

name: Scorch
description: Engulfs your target in flame for 38 damage

name: Immolate
description: Sets your target ablaze, dealing 12 damage per tick

name: Ignite Blood
description: Boils your target's blood for 9 damage per tick and lowers their fire resistance by 20

name: Jolt
description: Jolts your target for 28 damage and staggers them

name: Arc Lightning
description: Calls down lightning on your target for 60 damage

name: Rime
description: Coats your target in frost for 33 damage and lowers their ac by 18

name: Glacial Spike
description: Impales your target on a spike of ice for 55 damage

name: Venom
description: Floods your target with venom, dealing 6 damage per tick

name: Plague
description: Wracks your target with plague, dealing 14 damage per tick

name: Withering Curse
description: Withers your target, lowering their strength by 20 and dealing 9 damage per tick

name: Siphon Life
description: Tears 30 points of life from your target and grants it to you

name: Mend
description: Heals your target for 40 points

name: Salve
description: Heals your target for 75 points

name: Renewal
description: Heals your target for 12 per tick

name: Group Mend
description: Heals your entire group for 25 points

name: Second Wind
description: Heals your target for 30 points and restores 20 endurance

name: Barkskin
description: Protects your target against 35 points of damage

name: Stoneskin
description: Protects your target against 80 points of damage

name: Arcane Ward
description: Protects your target from 60 points of spell damage

name: Shielding
description: Increases your target's ac by 18

name: Resist Elements
description: Increases your target's resistance to all elements by 15

name: Thorns
description: Surrounds your target in thorns, dealing 12 damage to anything that strikes them

name: Ensnare
description: Slows your target's movement by 50%

name: Terror
description: Terrifies your target into fleeing

name: Blinding Flash
description: Blinds your target

name: Concussion
description: Concusses your target, stunning them

name: Cancel Magic
description: Strips a magical effect from your target

name: Invisibility
description: Conceals you from sight

name: Levitate
description: Lifts your target off the ground

name: Reptile Hide
description: Toughens your target's skin; when they are struck it knits the wound closed for 45 points

name: Bloodward
description: Wards your target so every blow against them returns 12 points of health

name: Last Rites
description: Blesses your target so the next killing blow leaves them standing at the brink

name: Adrenaline Surge
description: A blow of 150 or more floods you with adrenaline, closing 90 points of wounds

name: Arcane Bulwark
description: Blunts incoming spell damage by 50%, absorbing up to 1500 points

name: Spirit of the Lynx
description: Lends your target the lynx's hunger; their blows tear 30 points of life away

name: Mending Grace
description: Opens your target to healing, increasing every heal they receive by 15%

name: Blade Ward
description: Turns aside the next 2 attacks against your target entirely

name: Stoneshield
description: Mitigates 15% of incoming melee damage until 500 points have been turned

name: Spellshield
description: Mitigates 25% of incoming spell damage until 500 points have been turned

name: Sleetfall
description: Calls repeated waves of freezing sleet over an area, each wave dealing 18 damage

name: Emberfall
description: Calls repeated waves of molten steel over an area, each wave dealing 20 damage

name: Veil of Forgetting
description: Clouds the memory of everything nearby, wiping their hatred of you

name: Malaise
description: Saps your target's resistance to cold, poison and magic by 12

name: Scent of Ruin
description: Marks your target, lowering every elemental resistance by 10

name: Falcon Eye
description: Sharpens your target's aim, greatly improving ranged accuracy and revealing the unseen

name: Moonfire
description: Strikes your target for 45 damage and knits 25 points of your own wounds closed

name: Mind Shatter
description: Shatters your target's focus, draining 15 mana and dealing 11 damage per tick

name: War March
description: A driving march: your group gains haste, strength, attack and a thorned aura

name: Chorus of Replenishment
description: A restoring chorus, returning 8 health and 6 mana to your group each tick

name: Torrent of Misery
description: Floods everything near your target with misery, seizing their attention

name: Bond of Xalgoz
description: Binds your target in decay, draining 13 life per tick and feeding it to you
